title: The Wood Brothers
description: Dubbed "masters of soulful folk" by Paste, The Wood Brothers formed after brothers Chris and Oliver Wood pursued separate musical careers for 15 years. Chris already had legions of devoted fans for his incomparable work as one-third of Medeski Martin & Wood, while Oliver's band King Johnson built a loyal following in the South. With drummer Jano Rix added as a permanent third member, The Wood Brothers have evolved into one of roots music's most revered acts, playing sold out shows across North America, garnering a Grammy Award nomination and releasing nine studio albums, including their forthcoming release, Puff of Smoke, out August 1.

title: The Echo Foundation Presents AI For Humanity
description: Each year, The Echo Foundation honors visionary global and local leaders whose courage and compassion embody our mission to advance human dignity and justice. This inspiring evening unites the Charlotte community to celebrate the transformative power of education and our shared pursuit of a more just and humane world. This years event features Eli Collins, VP of product at Google DeepMind, who leads teams pioneering Generative AI models such as Gemini and Gemma, bridging groundbreaking research with real-world impact. Echo will also honor Andrea Smith, a distinguished Charlotte leader, philanthropist, and retired Bank of America executive, with the Award Against Indifference for her unwavering commitment to community and leadership in advancing opportunity. For sponsorship opportunities or to attend the VIP reception, please contact The Echo Foundation at 704-347-3844 or info@echfoundation.org or visit its website at EchoFoundation.org.

title: Belcanto Incanto Concert Series: Lift Every Voice and Sing
description: Celebrates the legacy of African American artists and composers in a moving tribute concert. Lift Every Voice explores the cultural truths and transformative power of Black voices in classical music?from spirituals to operatic arias. This concert is a stirring evening of heritage, harmony, inspiration, and celebration, paying homage to classical music giants while embracing the future of our great art form.

title: GenX Takeover Comedy Tour
description: Doors 6:30pm. Show 7:30pm. Welcome to Gen-X Takeover - where authenticity meets nostalgia. Our community is fueled by the vibrant voices of iconic creators like The Real Slim Sherri, Jon Wellington (The Dadbod Veteran, DBV), Nick Harrison (The Professor), and Kelly Manno, your best friend in your head with Special Guest host Justin Rupple. Each of them brings their unique flavor of humor, resilience, and unapologetic realness, making Gen-X Takeover the ultimate destination for those who celebrate life?s quirks and the power of being yourself.

All tickets are subject to applicable service fees via all points of purchase. The Best Show on Earth is headed back on the road for leg two of our tour! Join us for a night of laughs, pop culture, exclusive merch, drinks, games, and some VERY special guests! The Best Show on Earth Tour for the best fans on Earth. We can?t wait to see you there!
